behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to changed lines only, not full modified files.
behaviors.justification: The failure mode is at a module handoff: diff extraction/hunk parsing must feed only changed-line context into review prompt construction. A unit test of a single parser function can miss wiring mistakes where full-file content is reintroduced later. No real OS/network/LLM dependency is required to catch this specific failure.
behaviors.test_description: Run the review-input builder against a local fixture PR diff containing large unchanged sections and assert the final model input includes only changed hunks/lines (and excludes unchanged file bodies) across the diff parser + prompt assembly modules.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to correct positions in the PR diff view.
behaviors.justification: Correct diff positioning depends on real GitHub PR diff semantics/API validation (line/side/commit mapping). Mocking the API can easily hide real placement failures because mocks accept invalid mappings that GitHub rejects or displays differently.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions, then fetch PR review comments from GitHub and verify each lands on the intended file and diff line in the server-reported metadata.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a PR containing a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: This behavior validates model judgment quality, not just wiring. Correctness depends on real LLM output variability and capability; deterministic mocks cannot reveal missed-defect behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a real bug-seeded PR diff corpus case to the production model path and assert at least one returned finding matches the known defect class/location, allowing for phrasing variation.

behaviors.description: Every summary finding has a matching posted inline comment (no orphan summary items).
behaviors.justification: This is a cross-module consistency invariant between finding aggregation, inline-post result tracking, and summary rendering. The key failure is local state/bookkeeping mismatch across components; real network is not strictly required if posting outcomes are represented faithfully.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the pipeline with a local PR fixture and a test double comment sink that returns realistic success/failure IDs; assert the final summary list is derived only from successfully posted inline findings and each summary item maps to an inline comment record.

behaviors.description: End-to-end sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) completes for a real PR without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is explicitly a full agent pipeline outcome over multiple sequential stages, typically including an agentic analysis step plus external side effects. The real failure boundary is orchestration across the whole chain, not any single call.
behaviors.test_description: Run the automation unattended on a real sandbox PR from start to finish using production integrations, then verify completion status plus expected artifacts: diff consumed, inline comments created, and one top-level summary comment posted.
